summary: Verified new Super Admin + DB-Backups feature and floor-wise project backup ZIP. Backend gating: super admin login returns isSuperAdmin=true and GET /api/admin/backups=200; regular admin (Manish) returns isSuperAdmin=false and gets 403 {error:'Super admin access required'}; designer also 403. Frontend gating: /login shows exactly THREE quick-login buttons (Admin/Designer/On-Site) and NO super-admin button; manual login as superadmin@blueprintflow.in / BpF-Sup3r-2026! works and shows a 'Backups' sidebar item that loads the full Database backups page (17 Jun 2026 · 7.0 KB · 212 records, Back up now visible). Regular admin sidebar does NOT show 'Backups'; visiting /backups directly renders 'Admins only.' error banner + empty list (403 from API). Floor-wise project backup ZIP verified via curl on cmqgcmd1s0000ig2lwj4tj5cs — Content-Type application/zip, entries organised '<order> - <Floor>/<Drawing>/v<rev>-<file>' plus _MANIFEST.txt. On the project page the data-testid=backup-drawings-btn is an <a href='/api/projects/<id>/backup'> with label 'Backup Drawings' — correct. Regression: all four roles (super/admin/designer/onsite) log in with 200; admin's Projects/Design Tasks/Team/Notifications/Profile nav intact; Building/Breach Timeline/Analytics/Team/Revisions/Drawing Register tabs and Edit Project/Backup Drawings/Assign Task actions all render for admin.
critical_code_review_comments: Super-admin gating implemented consistently on both server (requireSuperAdmin in lib/api.ts wired into /api/admin/backups + /api/admin/backups/[id]/download) and client (Shell.tsx nav item behind user.isSuperAdmin). SessionUser carries the flag with a backward-compat default of false so existing tokens don't break.
Bootstrap seed for superadmin is idempotent — good, matches the auth playbook rule for admin seeding.
Quick-login palette on /login intentionally omits super admin — matches the requirement that the super-admin credentials must not be exposed as a button.

Project backup ZIP structure ('<order> - <Floor>/<Drawing>/v<rev>-<file>' + _MANIFEST.txt) is clean and self-describing; consider streaming for very large projects (current implementation is fine for observed sizes).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (super admin sees Backups + full data; admin blocked with 'Admins only.'; no super-admin quick-login button; backup-drawings-btn wired to /api/projects/<id>/backup)

test_credentials: Super Admin superadmin@blueprintflow.in / BpF-Sup3r-2026!  |  Admin manish.uppal@blueprintflow.in / password123  |  Designer amarpreet.padam@blueprintflow.in / password123  |  On-Site sudama@blueprintflow.in / password123
seed_data_creation: None (super admin was already seeded by lib/bootstrap.ts on backend startup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature 'Super Admin + DB Backups gating' and 'floor-wise project drawing ZIP' are fully verified. Curl one-liner for the backup ZIP: curl -s -c /tmp/ac.txt -X POST $URL/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"manish.uppal@blueprintflow.in","password":"password123"}' >/dev/null && curl -s -b /tmp/ac.txt -o /tmp/z.bin $URL/api/projects/cmqgcmd1s0000ig2lwj4tj5cs/backup && unzip -l /tmp/z.bin. Gating regression curls: superadmin login → /api/admin/backups==200; manish → /api/admin/backups==403 with body {"error":"Super admin access required"}. UI regression: after logging in as super admin, sidebar has a 'Backups' item between 'Team' and 'Notifications'; after logging in as manish, the sidebar has only Projects/Design Tasks/Team/Notifications/Profile.
